prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style darkness attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact eclipse-like darkness style: near-black violet mass, amethyst rim light, thin shard accents, and smoky residue that remains readable in battle. Make the subject a compact pre-hit charge knot with a slight forward pull, as if darkness is gathering before impact. Keep the silhouette tight, premium, and easy to composite over a battle scene. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no decorative magical symbols, no oversized fog bank, no neon overload
